stem: A model predicts that the area of a forest reserve was 8,400 hectares in 2015. The model also predicts that each year for the next 7 years, the area A increased by 2% of the previous year's area. Which equation best represents this model, where x is the number of years after 2015, for x ≤ 7?
rationale: Choice C is correct. An annual increase of 2% multiplies the previous year's value by 1.02. Starting from 8,400 hectares, after x years the area is 8,400(1.02)x. Choices A and B raise 8,400 itself to the x-th power, which is not exponential growth. Choice D models a 2% annual decrease.
